Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class CMSConnectSource

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.CMSConnectSource
public class CMSConnectSource extends Metadata

Java class for CMSConnectSource complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="CMSConnectSource">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="cmsConnectAsset" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CMSConnectAsset" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="cmsConnectLanguage" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CMSConnectLanguage" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="cmsConnectPersonalization" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CMSConnectPersonalization" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="cmsConnectResourceType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CMSConnectResourceType" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="connectionType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CMSSourceConnectionType"/>
         <element name="cssScope" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="developerName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="languageEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="namedCredential" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="personalizationEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="rootPath" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sortOrder" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="status" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CMSConnectionStatus"/>
         <element name="type" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CMSConnectionSourceType"/>
         <element name="websiteUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Method Details

    • getCmsConnectAsset

      public List<CMSConnectAsset> getCmsConnectAsset()
      Gets the value of the cmsConnectAsset property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the cmsConnectAsset property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getCmsConnectAsset().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list CMSConnectAsset

      Returns:
      The value of the cmsConnectAsset property.

    • getCmsConnectLanguage

      public List<CMSConnectLanguage> getCmsConnectLanguage()
      Gets the value of the cmsConnectLanguage property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the cmsConnectLanguage property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getCmsConnectLanguage().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list CMSConnectLanguage

      Returns:
      The value of the cmsConnectLanguage property.

    • getCmsConnectResourceType

      public List<CMSConnectResourceType> getCmsConnectResourceType()
      Gets the value of the cmsConnectResourceType property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the cmsConnectResourceType property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getCmsConnectResourceType().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list CMSConnectResourceType

      Returns:
      The value of the cmsConnectResourceType property.
